description_long: This is an upright piano with a light wood finish, featuring a full-length keyboard with alternating black and white keys. The front panel is flat and unadorned except for a subtle brand marking above the keyboard, and the top lid is closed, giving the piano a clean, rectangular silhouette. Two pedals are visible at the base, positioned centrally for foot operation. The sides and back are constructed from the same light wood, with the back panel being a solid, unbroken surface. The control panel with buttons is located on the left side above the keys, suggesting this is a digital or hybrid piano. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for both indoor and semi-public urban environments.
description: A modern upright piano with a light wood finish, full keyboard, and two pedals, featuring a clean, minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, control panel, two pedals, and subtle brand marking.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the piano's depth, the closed lid, and the side profile of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, flat wooden back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the piano's depth and the side profile of the keyboard and closed lid.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-length keyboard with alternating white and black keys, no missing or split keys, typical of upright pianos.
